case_title: LINCOLN PROPERTY COMPANY MANAGEMENT SERVICES,INC. vs. SCARNATI, CLAUDETTE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION GIVING PROPERTY MANAGER AUTHORITY TO SUE ON OWNERS BEHALF FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINCOLN PROPERTY COMPANY MANAGEMENT SERVICES,INC.
